summary: The /about page remains a bare placeholder ("This is an about page" with no nav or footer) — unchanged across audits. Homepage performance dropped from 72 → 67 (still below 85, LCP at 7.6 s is the top concern); /projects and /projects/note-structurer also regressed meaningfully; /projects/screenshot-to-primevue is healthy.

pages.visual_fingerprint: Full-page portfolio homepage with a teal-accented hero ('App' heading, 'Send me a message' CTA), four content sections (pillars, case studies, skills, contact form), and a dark contact footer — all sections visible and correctly laid out on both desktop and mobile.

visual_findings: Page contains only the placeholder text 'This is an about page' on an otherwise near-blank dark canvas — no real content, nav, or footer present on either desktop or mobile.
pages.visual_fingerprint: Nearly blank dark page with only the stub text 'This is an about page' in the upper-left corner and no other UI elements visible on desktop or mobile.

Fully styled projects index page with 'My Projects' heading, four project cards (Clinical Note Structurer, Screenshot → PrimeVue, Lease Diff Explainer, Paperwork → Calendar) in a 2-column desktop grid, and a dark contact footer — all content visible and correctly laid out on both desktop and mobile.

Clinical Note Structurer detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 9/10 passing' badge, a two-column visit note / structured result interactive demo, disclaimer banner, expandable JSON and HIPAA notes accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

Screenshot → PrimeVue detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 5/5 passing' badge, a dashed-border image drop zone, three sample thumbnail cards (Login form, Analytics dashboard, Pricing page), a placeholder result panel, expandable accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

score_deltas: / performance 72 → 67 (-5 pts, at regression threshold; persistently below 85)
/about performance 87 → 84 (-3 pts, within jitter; page remains a placeholder)
/about tbt_ms 121 → 62 (within jitter for a near-empty page)
top_fix: Fix the homepage LCP (currently 7.6 s, performance 67, persistently and significantly below 85): preload or optimize the hero image and eliminate render-blocking resources — this is the single highest-impact improvement on the site and is getting worse, not better.
issue_title: Homepage performance regression: score 67, LCP 7.6 s — worsening trend
issue_body:
## Homepage performance is regressing

The homepage (`/`) has dropped from 72 → 67 on today's audit (mobile Lighthouse), with LCP worsening from 7.2 s → 7.6 s. This is the **sixth consecutive audit** where performance has remained well below the 85 threshold, and the trend has reversed — it is now getting slower again.

### Current metrics (mobile)
| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Performance | 67 |
| LCP | 7,584 ms |
| CLS | 0.015 |
| TBT | 101 ms |

### Scope of regression this audit
- `/` performance: 72 → 67 (-5 pts)
- `/projects` performance: 86 → 75 (-11 pts), LCP: 3,444 → 4,281 ms
- `/projects/note-structurer` performance: 96 → 87 (-9 pts), LCP: 2,109 → 3,056 ms

The `/projects` and `/projects/note-structurer` regressions may be correlated (e.g. a shared resource or network condition), but they are significant and worth investigating alongside the homepage.

### Suggested fixes for `/`
1. Preload the hero image (LCP element) with `<link rel="preload" as="image">`.
2. Serve the hero in a next-gen format (WebP/AVIF) and size it appropriately for mobile.
3. Defer or remove any render-blocking scripts/stylesheets above the fold.
4. Check if a recently introduced resource is blocking paint on `/projects` and sub-pages.

### Also open
- `/about` remains an empty placeholder (stub text only, no nav/footer) — SEO score 83, below threshold.
